title: Secure steward adoption + >=1 documented downstream use
context: The project's definition of 'shipped' requires a named steward who has adopted, hosted, or cited the graph, and at least one documented concrete downstream use (a tool, paper, or integration). This converts the project from a good-deed artifact to a proven real-world resource. Builds on the candidate-steward engagement from oncogene-kg-partner-002.
objective: Convert at least one candidate steward to a named adopter who commits to host, cite, or integrate the graph, and document at least one concrete downstream use (a tool, paper, or integration built on the graph).
acceptanceCriteria: A named academic, advocacy, or community steward formally commits to adopt, host, or cite the graph.
The commitment is documented with organization name, named contact, form of adoption, and date.
>=1 concrete downstream use is documented: a specific tool, published paper, or integration that uses the graph data.
The downstream use documentation includes a URL or citation.
verifiedNeed can be updated to true upon completion of this task.
output: docs/steward-adoption.md documenting the named steward commitment and >=1 concrete downstream use with URL or citation, committed via PR.
